HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT DOUGLAS SINGLER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. DOUGLAS SINGLER HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN CSR #4780(D206)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendants Andrew Damele and Douglas Singler's Motion for Summary Judgment/or in the Alternative Summary Adjudication Appearances: Cindy Lee, Esq. Law Offices of Cindy Lee, (415) 752-6070, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Jessica Alexandra, Esq. Law Offices of Behrend, Morrison & Alexandra, (415) 956-0549, appearing for Defendants and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for summary judgment denied. Triable issue of fact whether February rent was paid. Tex Stadiem's declaration referenced. Order signed in Open Court. (302/CWW/VC) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED., MAR-11-2009: CINDY LEE, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; MR. TEX STADIEM, PROPERTY MANAGER, IS ALSO PRESENT. FULL SCOPE ATTORNEY JESSICA ALEXANDRA, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS ANDREW DE MELLI AND DOUGLAS SINGLER, WHO ARE BOTH PRESENT THIS DAY. THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT JAMES TAUGHER THIS DATE.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JPT IRVING PFEFFER; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-218).
